title: Orders endpoint accepts negative quantities
description: A customer ordered -3 jetpacks and the total went negative. Input validation is missing on POST /api/orders.

title: Product catalog has no pagination
description: GET /api/products returns the full catalog. Page load times are degrading as the catalog grows.

title: No health endpoint for the load balancer
description: The ops team needs a /health endpoint to wire up load balancer probes before the pilot launch.

title: Discount codes are case-sensitive in the mobile app
description: Support tickets show users typing 'moonlanding' and getting no discount. The API uppercases codes but the mobile client pre-validates case-sensitively.

title: Jetpack stock oversold during flash sale
description: Stock levels are not checked or decremented when an order is placed. We sold 14 refurbished jetpacks; we have 3.

title: Nebula Night Light photos missing alt text
description: Product images on the storefront are missing alt text, failing WCAG 2.1 AA checks.
